meta.title: Observability, Eval, Telemetry, and Trace Review
meta.description: Parity-backed review packet for the monitor-heartbeat proof spike after local proof verification.

props.title: Proof-Carrying Observability Backbone
props.subtitle: A parity-backed consolidation for Lev eval, telemetry, traces, and operational proof.
props.meta: Updated 2026-05-22 from .lev/pm/parity, design, task, receipts, and verifier output

props.content: The recommended first move is not a broad SRE clone. It is a monitor-heartbeat proof spike that makes one status signal hard to fake: RunEvidence, Trace, Receipt, GateProof, live probe artifacts, and projection must all agree before the UI can say green. The POC proof is green locally; production promotion is paused for review and AgentPing submodule promotion.

props.label: CORPUS
props.title: Parity Crawl Signals
props.subtitle: The generated scorecard remains a projection; .lev/pm/parity/*.yaml is the canon.

props.label: DECISIONS
props.title: Resolved Branches
props.subtitle: Interview questions were answered through architecture review before proposal.

rows.why: Lev differentiates through evidence, not another dashboard clone.
Small vertical path from SRE parity to RunEvidence, Trace, Receipt, GateProof, projection.
Avoids a vague core/observability bucket and keeps proof code with behavior owners.
Repo-wide green tests cannot prove behavior or block false greens.

rows.decision: lev.now review, then pause before exec
rows.why: Human review happens before production implementation starts.

props.title: Intent
props.content: MonitorCheck or HeartbeatObservation enters with owner, target, schedule, and freshness.

props.title: Run
props.content: A bounded probe emits RunEvidence tied to run identity.

props.title: Trace
props.content: Trace exposes monitor id, verifier, exit code, and evidence refs.

props.title: GateProof
props.content: Semantic acceptance fails closed for stale, fake, or missing evidence.

props.title: Projection
props.content: Status renders from proof-backed state only.

props.label: PROPOSAL
props.title: monitor-heartbeat-proof-spike-v1
props.subtitle: The POC slices are locally verified; production promotion is intentionally paused for review.

props.title: S1 Contract POC
props.content: Monitor and heartbeat contracts reject missing target, stale timestamp, fake success text, missing evidence refs, and bounded live probe timeouts.

props.title: S2 Run Evidence
props.content: RunEvidence, trace, structural receipt, telemetry capture identity, and semantic GateProof form one queryable proof chain.

props.title: S3 Status Projection
props.content: Projection shows healthy only from fresh proof and degrades or blocks stale and missing proof.

props.title: S4 Review Gate
props.content: Pentagon, UltraQA, test triad, package typechecks, receipt parsing, and worktree isolation now pass locally; submodule promotion remains before merge.

rows.proof: MonitorCheck and HeartbeatObservation reject stale, fake, malformed, and evidence-less observations.
Probe emits RunEvidence, telemetry bridge data, trace fields, receipt identity, and GateProof refs.
Projection reads proof object and degrades when proof is incomplete.
Task fixtures for stale, fake, missing, and malformed observation fail closed.
UltraQA attacks prompt injection, stale state, dirty worktree, hung command, flaky rerun, and misleading success.

props.title: Pause before exec
props.content: The proof spike is locally verified, but production promotion should not proceed until this review is accepted and the AgentPing submodule changes are promoted intentionally. The parent repository must still avoid main merge until the submodule, final closeout, and review gates are clean.

lev task validate .lev/pm/tasks/monitor-heartbeat-proof-spike-v1 --json
pnpm --filter @lev-os/exec typecheck
pnpm --filter @lev-os/exec test -- run-evidence
pnpm --dir core/telemetry typecheck && pnpm --dir core/telemetry exec vitest run
pnpm --dir community/agentping --filter @kingly/ui build
pnpm --dir community/agentping/packages/dashboard-manager-ui exec tsc --noEmit
pnpm --dir community/agentping/packages/dashboard-manager-ui exec vitest run exec-traces StatusBadge
pnpm exec tsx core/testing/src/cli.ts --root . --scope public --gate --json .lev/pm/tasks/monitor-heartbeat-proof-spike-v1/receipts/pentagon-public-audit.json
git diff --check -- . ':(exclude)community/agentping' && git -C community/agentping diff --check

rows.failure: Probe prints SUCCESS but exits non-zero or lacks EvidenceRef.
Receipt is old but status still renders green.

rows.gate: Projection E2E and no local truth rule

rows.failure: Production code mixes with unrelated checkout changes.
Module-specific monitor harness lands in core/testing.
AgentPing projection code remains local and parent repo points at the old gitlink.
rows.gate: Intentional submodule commit or promotion path before parent merge

props.content: Approve this packet to continue into `/exec` for the next promotion step: commit or otherwise promote the AgentPing submodule changes, rerun final S4 closeout, and only then consider parent-main merge. If the review rejects the boundary, update the design before execution.
